zh.lifeSummary: 當Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny於大約1020年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼時，他的父親Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes66歲，母親Ermengarde de Verdun47歲。他和Avoise de Roucy至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1078年2月5日之後，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯盧希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny于大约1020年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼时，他的父亲Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes66岁，母亲Ermengarde de Verdun47岁。他和Avoise de Roucy至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1078年2月5日之后，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯盧希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Godefroi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the personal name Godefroy, from ancient Germanic Godafrid, composed of the elements god ‘god’ and frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin. Compare Godfroy .

variants.name: Godfroy
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

variants.name: Goffin
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational from German Hopfen ‘hops’. The initial g is due to Russian influence, since Russian has no h and alters it to g in borrowed words and names.
French and Walloon: from a pet form of the personal name   Godefroy  .
French and Walloon: possibly also a nickname from a diminutive of Old French goffe ‘heavy, coarse’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny was born about 1020, in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes, was 66 and his mother, Ermengarde de Verdun, was 47. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Avoise de Roucy. He died after 5 February 1078, and was buried in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny est né environ 1020, à Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Verdun, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Avoise de Roucy. Il est décédé après 5 février 1078, et a été enterré à Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny um 1020 in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes 66 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Verdun 47. Er hatte mit Avoise de Roucy mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 5. Februar 1078 und wurde in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny è nato il circa 1020 nel Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Verdun, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Avoise de Roucy. Morì dopo il 5 febbraio 1078, e fu sepolto a Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumignyが約1020年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニーで生まれた時，父Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennesは66歳，母Ermengarde de Verdunは47歳であった。彼はAvoise de Roucyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1078年2月5日以後に死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンロウシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 럼익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Verdun(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Avoise de Roucy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1078년 2월 5일 이후 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 루시에 묻혔다.

mn.Abt 1020–Aft 5 February 1078: ойролцоогоор 1020 он–1078 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 5–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Verdun, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Avoise de Roucy. Ele faleceu após 5 de fevereiro de 1078, e foi sepultado em Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny родился около 1020 г. в местности румигни, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Verdun, 47. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Avoise de Roucy. Он умер после 5 февраль 1078 г. и был похоронен в местности роуси, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

sm.Abt 1020–Aft 5 February 1078: e tusa o le 1020–ina ua ma'ea le 5 Fepuari 1078

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godefroi IV de Rumigny Lord of Florennes and Rumigny nació aproximadamente 1020, en Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Verdun, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Avoise de Roucy. Murió después de 5 de febrero de 1078, y fue sepultado en Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
